meta.footEn: Data snapshot: 2026-06-27 · Garmin fenix 8 via Freddy

en.c5d: computed from sleep, HRV, RHR, stress & recent load
en.rec: Solid 7h33 (score 82) with bedtime back to 22:58 — deep 1h01, light 4h25, REM a strong 2h07, only 18m awake. But the autonomic markers diverged: HRV fell to 31 (−9 under the 7-day baseline of 40, the week's low) and RHR ticked up to 57 (the week's high). Sleep architecture was good, recovery signals lagged — a classic 'slept fine, not fully recovered' night. Note Thursday (25th) wasn't tracked, so the trailing chart shows the seven most recent recorded nights. Treat today as easy: aerobic Z2 or mobility, hold off on heavy load, and aim for an early night to let HRV rebound.

hr.c5d: izračunato iz sna, HRV-a, RHR-a, stresa i opterećenja
hr.rec: Solidnih 7h33 (ocjena 82) uz lijeganje natrag na 22:58 — duboki 1h01, lagani 4h25, REM snažnih 2h07, samo 18m budnosti. No autonomni pokazatelji su se razišli: HRV je pao na 31 (−9 ispod 7-dnevne osnovice 40, najniže u tjednu), a RHR porastao na 57 (najviše u tjednu). Arhitektura sna bila je dobra, ali signali oporavka zaostaju — klasična noć 'dobro spavano, nije potpuno oporavljeno'. Napomena: četvrtak (25.) nije zabilježen, pa graf prikazuje sedam najnovijih zabilježenih noći. Neka danas bude lagano: aerobni Z2 ili mobilnost, bez teškog opterećenja, i lezi rano da se HRV oporavi.
